overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a journey from a pedestrian crosswalk in a desert canyon, along commercial sidewalks with digital billboards, onto a winding highway, and finally approaching a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape with neon-lit towers during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk at desert canyon road

events.description: begins walking forward from crosswalk onto sidewalk
moves past initial pedestrian area into commercial sidewalk zone

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a multi-lane road with red rock hills in the background

notable_agents.action: woman in tank top walking toward the camera
man standing near the crosswalk edge

entered.detail: large reddish-orange rock formations forming the canyon walls with sparse vegetation
massive white concrete wall built into the hillside with geometric patterns
white painted zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt road
tall modern street light with attached traffic signal

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a pedestrian crosswalk in a desert canyon environment with distinctive red rock formations. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk, passing several pedestrians while a massive concrete retaining wall dominates the left side of the frame. The lighting is warm golden hour sun, casting long shadows across the scene.

events.description: large digital billboards become visible on the right side of the road
approaching intersection with traffic lights and waiting vehicles

agents.ego_description: continuing along the commercial sidewalk past illuminated billboards and street furniture

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large digital advertisement screen mounted on metal framework
vertical traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more commercial stretch of sidewalk lined with digital billboards on the right. The concrete retaining wall recedes into the left background as the camera passes street lights and approaches a traffic intersection. Vehicles move along the multi-lane road, and the warm sunset lighting continues to bathe the red rock hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding canyon road with graffiti barriers

events.description: transitions from sidewalk to road level and increases movement speed
road curves revealing industrial construction site and distant city towers

agents.ego_description: moving at increased speed along the winding asphalt road through the canyon

notable_agents.action: white car driving in the opposite direction along the curve

entered.detail: concrete safety barrier covered in colorful graffiti separating the road from the hillside
unfinished industrial building with scaffolding and construction cranes
asphalt road with double yellow lines curving through the canyon landscape

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the sidewalk onto the asphalt road itself, traveling at higher speed along a winding canyon route. Graffiti-covered concrete barriers line the right side, while the massive red rock hills shift to the right of the frame. An industrial construction site appears ahead, and the urban landscape begins to dominate the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city outskirts with neon towers

events.description: futuristic cyberpunk city skyline with illuminated towers comes into view
sun creates golden lens flare effects as it sets behind the city buildings

agents.ego_description: traveling along the highway approaching the neon-lit cyberpunk city center

entered.detail: tall cylindrical tower with '07' signage and glowing neon accents
cluster of futuristic industrial buildings with smokestacks and holographic displays
large glowing advertisement projections on building facades

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals the destination: a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis with towering skyscrapers adorned with neon lights and holographic billboards. The road continues toward the city as the sun sets behind the buildings, creating a dramatic golden backlight. The red rock hills recede into the distant right background, replaced by the industrial urban landscape of the futuristic city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a rugged desert canyon that gradually evolves into a sprawling, neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins at a pedestrian crosswalk amidst red rock formations, moving along a concrete sidewalk beneath the warm glow of the golden hour sun. As the camera advances, the environment shifts toward a commercial district where digital billboards line the path and the red hills remain visible beyond a busy traffic intersection. The scene then transitions from the sidewalk onto a winding asphalt highway, accelerating past graffiti-covered barriers and industrial construction sites as the urban horizon begins to dominate the view. Finally, the road leads directly into a futuristic cityscape of towering skyscrapers and holographic displays, with the setting sun creating a dramatic backlight against the encroaching industrial landscape.
